zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bourgoyne於1392年出生在英國坎布利其爾德利 德雷頓時，他的父親John De Burgoyne Esq.32歲，母親Alice Margaret Harleston22歲。他於1422年與Joan de Peyton在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾阿林頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1435年在他的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bourgoyne于1392年出生在英国坎布利其爾德利 德雷頓时，他的父亲John De Burgoyne Esq.32岁，母亲Alice Margaret Harleston22岁。他于1422年与Joan de Peyton在英国英格兰坎布利其爾阿林頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1435年在他的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bourgoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bourgoyne was born in 1392, in Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, John De Burgoyne Esq., was 32 and his mother, Alice Margaret Harleston, was 22. He married Joan de Peyton in 1422, in Arrington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1435, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bourgoyne est né en 1392, à Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John De Burgoyne Esq., avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Margaret Harleston, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Peyton en 1422, à Arrington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1435, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bourgoyne 1392 in Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Burgoyne Esq. 32 und seine Mutter Alice Margaret Harleston 22. Er hat 1422 in Arrington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Peyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bourgoyne è nato il nel 1392 nel Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, John De Burgoyne Esq., aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alice Margaret Harleston, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Peyton nel 1422, nel Arrington, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1435, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bourgoyneが1392年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアドリー ドレイトンで生まれた時，父John De Burgoyne Esq.は32歳，母Alice Margaret Harlestonは22歳であった。1422年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアアリントンでJoan de Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1435年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bourgoyne(이)가 1392년 영국 캄브리지실르 드리 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Burgoyne Esq.(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Margaret Harleston(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 아링턴에서 Joan de Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1435년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bourgoyne nasceu em 1392, em Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Burgoyne Esq., tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Margaret Harleston, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Peyton em 1422, em Arrington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1435, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bourgoyne родился в 1392 г. в местности дри дреитон, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Burgoyne Esq. было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Margaret Harleston, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Peyton в 1422 г. в местности аррингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1435 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bourgoyne nació en 1392, en Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Burgoyne Esq., tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Margaret Harleston, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan de Peyton en 1422, en Arrington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1435, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
